name: TAG Oil Ltd.
summary: TAG Oil Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas in Canada, New Zealand, and Australia. The company operates exploration and production permits in New Zealand; and an exploration and production permit in Australia. It holds 100% interest in the Petroleum Lease 17 permit that covers an area of 2,75,000 acres in ATP 2037 and ATP 2038 located in the Surat Basin in Australia. The company was formerly known as Durum Cons. Energy Corp. and changed its name to TAG Oil Ltd. in June 2002. TAG Oil Ltd. was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
